description:
You are the e-commerce manager launching a new "Artisan Coffee Collection" product line for your WooCommerce store. This involves setting up the full product catalog, fulfillment logistics, a promotional campaign, and processing an initial order.

Create a product category hierarchy with a parent category "Artisan Coffee" and a subcategory "Single Origin".

Create and publish a variable product named "Ethiopian Yirgacheffe Coffee" (SKU: EYC-001) in the "Single Origin" category. It should have two attributes used for variations: "Roast Level" (Light, Medium, Dark) and "Size" (250g, 500g, 1kg) — 9 variations total. Set regular prices by size across all roast levels: 250g = $14.99, 500g = $24.99, 1kg = $39.99. Enable stock management for every variation with these quantities: Light/250g: 50, Light/500g: 30, Light/1kg: 20, Medium/250g: 60, Medium/500g: 40, Medium/1kg: 25, Dark/250g: 45, Dark/500g: 35, Dark/1kg: 15. Add "Organic Cotton T-Shirt" as a cross-sell.

Create a shipping class named "Fragile Items" (slug: fragile-items, description: "Products requiring careful handling during transit.") and assign it to the Ethiopian Yirgacheffe Coffee product.

Create a coupon code "COFFEE15" as a fixed cart discount of $5.00 with minimum spend $25.00, usage limit 200, restricted to the "Single Origin" category, expiry date 2026-12-31.

Create a manual order for customer Emily Chen (emily.chen@example.com), billing state NY, containing 2x Ethiopian Yirgacheffe Coffee (Medium/500g) and 1x Wireless Bluetooth Headphones. Add a private note "Expedited shipping requested - fragile items included" and set the order status to Processing.

metadata.shipping_class_description: Products requiring careful handling during transit.
metadata.order_note: Expedited shipping requested - fragile items included
